title: paspalum expansum
intro: Paspalum expansum, also known as the broad-leaved paspalum or Paspalum dilatatum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Paspalum expansum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support digestive health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Paspalum expansum can be made by infusing the dried leaves in hot water to create a tea or by making a tincture with the plant's extract.
